_comment: Pinned commit for BYOB upstream (github.com/wxtsky/byob). Bump only via `/update --bump-byob`. The /update skill clones BYOB to ~/.byob/ and checks out this commit before running `bun install && bun run build`.
notes: Initial pin uses 'main' as a placeholder. Replace with a specific commit SHA on first /update --bump-byob run.
